title: Barbosa pseudococos
taxonomy: Barbosa pseudococos is classified within the family Arecaceae. It is a palm species native to South America. The exact classification of Barbosa pseudococos is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Arecales, Family: Arecaceae, Genus: Barbosa, Species: B. pseudococos. Barbosa pseudococos is further divided into various infra-specific taxa based on geographical distribution.
